text: content="Ready to learn coding or math? We've got 30+ hands-on courses for every age � from Scratch for kids to AI for college students. Real projects, real skills, real results. Start your journey today!">
<!-- beautiful-tabs.css removed � styles now handled by internal minimalist CSS -->
Whether you're 8 or 80, just starting out or leveling up � we've got a course that fits.
/* ====== LEARN SECTION � PROFESSIONAL MINIMALIST ====== */
Choose your track and level � we'll show you the perfect courses to get started.

No boring theory dumps. You'll build real projects from day one � games, apps, websites.

description: 'The perfect first step into coding! Kids drag and drop colorful blocks to create games, animations, and stories. No typing needed � just creativity and curiosity.',
description: 'Learn real Python through Turtle graphics � draw shapes, create patterns, and build mini-games. It\'s like art class meets coding!',
description: 'Train your brain with puzzles, patterns, and coding challenges. Think like a computer scientist � break big problems into small steps.',
description: 'Build your own mobile apps using drag-and-drop tools! No coding experience needed � just ideas and imagination.',
description: 'The language behind Instagram, Spotify, and Netflix. Learn Python through real projects � from games to automation scripts.',
description: 'Build complete websites from scratch � front-end, back-end, databases, everything. The skills that get you hired.',
description: 'Design beautiful, responsive websites that work on any device. HTML, CSS, JavaScript � the holy trinity of the web.',
description: 'Learn what happens behind the scenes � servers, databases, APIs. Build the engine that powers web applications.',
description: 'Build apps that run on millions of phones. From idea to App Store � learn the complete mobile development journey.',
description: 'Teach computers to learn! Build image recognizers, chatbots, and prediction models. The future is AI � be part of it.',
description: 'Learn to organize and query data like a pro. Every app needs a database � this is how you build them right.',
description: 'The complete package � React, Node.js, MongoDB, and everything in between. Build production-ready applications.',
description: 'From basics to building AI applications. Python is everywhere � web, data science, automation, AI. Master it all.',
description: 'Learn to build fast, secure, and elegant iOS applications using Swift and Apple�s native frameworks.',
description: 'Build intelligent systems that learn and adapt. Neural networks, deep learning, computer vision � the works.',
description: 'Turn raw data into insights that drive decisions. Statistics, visualization, machine learning � become data-fluent.',
description: 'MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js � the modern web stack. Build full-stack apps that companies actually use.',
description: 'Create games with Unity and Unreal Engine. From 2D platformers to 3D worlds � bring your imagination to life.',
description: 'Design, query, and optimize databases. The backbone of every application � learn to build it right.',
description: 'Extract insights from complex datasets. Excel, Python, SQL � become the person who finds the answers in data.',
description: 'Advanced algorithmic trading � build automated systems that trade while you sleep.',
description: 'A welcoming space for girls to start their coding journey. From basics to building real projects � at your own pace.',
description: 'Level up from intermediate to tech leader. Cloud, AI, blockchain � master the technologies shaping tomorrow.',
description: 'Build a rock-solid math foundation! Numbers, operations, fractions, geometry � everything grades 1-5 need.',
description: 'Pre-algebra, ratios, geometry basics � the bridge between elementary and high school math.',
description: 'Algebra, geometry, trig, pre-calc, calculus � accelerated learning for ambitious students.',
description: 'Advanced calculus, linear algebra, differential equations � the math that powers engineering and science.',
description: 'Quantitative finance, risk analysis, financial modeling � the math that moves money.',
description: 'Statistics, probability, ML math � the foundation every data professional needs.',
Whether you're looking to switch careers, get promoted, or train your team � we'll create a custom program that fits your goals.
